    TextGenerator.generate(Function<int[],Tensor> forwarder, int maxSeqLen, Tokenizer tok, String prompt, int maxNewTokens, float temperature, int topK, long seed)
    Generate text with an explicit maxSeqLen — useful when no config is available.
    static String
    TextGenerator.generate(Function<int[],Tensor> forwarder, TransformerConfig cfg, Tokenizer tok, String prompt, int maxNewTokens, float temperature, int topK, long seed)
    Generate text using any model that maps int[] ids → [seqLen × vocabSize] logits.
